emitterParams.note: D2 preliminary realization sketch for attention_head512_f16kv on WSE-3 (HEAD_DIM=512, BLOCK_SIZE=16, HEAD_DIM_VECS=128). Numbers are minimum-valid placeholders: peGrid width=1, shards=1, tiles=[1,1,1,1]. Real realization requires (a) attention body op in the semantic schema so residency can be planned per role, (b) softmax reduction representation, (c) streaming KV shape that matches the workgroup-scoped shared_block pattern in the WGSL. Held preliminary pre-B merge per the workstream baseline pin; regeneration scheduled for D3. See attention_head256_f16kv.notes.md for the shared schema-gap list.

rejections.detail: Preliminary realization: attention_head512_f16kv residency is placeholder-shaped pending the semantic-schema attention body op extension. Same structural plan as attention_head256_f16kv with different per-block geometry (BLOCK_SIZE=16, HEAD_DIM=512). Held pre-B merge.
